    Method
    Description

    CoffFile.Parser.setCharset(Charset charset)
    Sets the charset used for decoding strings in the COFF string table.

    Method
    Description

    CoffSectionTable.get(int index, CoffFile.Parser parser)

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    CoffFile(CoffFile.Parser parser)
    Constructs a COFF file by parsing from a parser.
    protected
    CoffHeader(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser)
    Constructs a COFF header by parsing from a parser.
     
    CoffRelocationTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser, CoffSection section, int pointerToRelocations, int numberOfRelocations)
    Parses a COFF relocation table from a parser.
    protected
    CoffSectionTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser)
    Creates a lazily loaded section table for a parser-backed COFF file.
    protected
    CoffStringTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser)
    Parses a string table from a parser-backed COFF file.
    protected
    CoffSymbolTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser)
    Parses a symbol table from a parser-backed COFF file.

    CoffBytes(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser, String name, int physicalAddress, int virtualAddress, int sizeOfRawData, int pointerToRawData, int pointerToRelocations, int pointerToLineNumbers, int numberOfRelocations, short numberOfLinenumbers, CoffSectionFlags characteristics)
